title: Front Door Skills
description: Start here when the request is broad, needs triage, or should route through the shortest high-signal entry point.

title: View And Stack Decisions
description: Use these when the main job is choosing the right text view, platform surface, or TextKit stack.

title: SwiftUI And Wrapper Boundaries
description: Use these when the hard part is crossing between SwiftUI and UIKit or AppKit text systems.

title: TextKit Runtime And Layout
description: Use these for fallback behavior, layout invalidation, viewport rendering, and direct TextKit runtime mechanics.

title: Editor Features And Interaction
description: Use these for editing behaviors such as Writing Tools, undo, input, interaction, accessibility, and clipboard flows.

title: Rich Text And Formatting
description: Use these when the work centers on attributed content, formatting attributes, attachments, colors, or Markdown semantics.

title: Text Model And Foundation Utilities
description: Use these for storage, parsing, Core Text, bidirectional text, and Foundation or NaturalLanguage text utilities.
